name: gtm-distribution-audit
description: Audit a project or idea against the Distribution Channel Playbook before investing in building channels. Scores GTM readiness across 12 dimensions (pain evidence, user language, keyword opportunity, SERP, channels, directory, content, landing/SEO, ASO, GEO, conversion/retention, learning loop) for digital marketing (SEO, ASO, GEO, content), enforces evidence-first gates, and renders a self-contained visual report. Triggers on: "GTM audit", "distribution readiness", "go-to-market audit", "distribution channel audit", "should I build this channel".
